_comment: Representative StepMania charts for regression testing
_instructions: Add relative paths from Songs/ directory. These charts should cover various edge cases and format variations.

charts.name: High Speed Chart
charts.description: High BPM (210) with multiple difficulties, modern format

charts.name: Complex BPM Changes
charts.path: DDR A3/Continue to the real world/Continue to the real world.sm
charts.description: Multiple BPM transitions (93-186) with stops/freezes and double charts

charts.name: Extreme BPM Variations
charts.description: 15 BPM changes ranging 80-160 BPM with 6 stops - most complex timing

charts.name: Widest BPM Range
charts.description: Extreme BPM range 106-424 BPM - stress test for BPM handling

charts.name: Heavy Stops
charts.description: 9 freeze points with BPM drop to 90 - stop/freeze handling

charts.name: Extreme Low BPM
charts.description: BPM drops to 40 - extreme low BPM handling

charts.name: Steady High BPM with Stops
charts.description: Stable 160 BPM with significant freeze durations

charts.name: Simple Baseline
charts.description: Simple chart with constant BPM, no timing gimmicks - baseline reference
